free_text: Cross-section measurements for (n,2n) and (n,p)
reactions on tellurium isotopes in the neutron
energy range of 13.5-14.6 MeV
Same 122,128Te(n,2n)121g,,127gTe data given
ZF-300-II Intense Neutron Generator
The thickness of the tritium-titanium (T-Ti)
target used in the generator was 1.35 mg/cm2.
The tellurium powder of 99.999% purity was
compressed into a disk 20 mm in diameter and was
then sandwiched between two niobium foils (99.99%
purity) of the same diameter, finally wrapped in 1
mm thick cadmium foil.
CH8403 coaxial high-purity germanium detector,
sensitive volume 110 cm3.
Corrections were made for gamma-ray  self-absorption
in the sample, for gamma-gamma coincidence  summing
effects, for fluctuation of the neutron flux during
their radiationand for sample geometry.
The errors from counting statistics, detector
efficiency, monitor reaction cross sections, weight
of samples, self-absorption of gamma ray,
coincidence summing effect of cascade gamma rays and
sample geometry.
Scale error
Approved by Kong Xiangzhong in July 25,2009
Compiled by Yu Hongwei
On. REFERENCE: J,PR/C,80,054615,2009 added
